what: fj flat-colored floor/ceiling (visplane) raster wired into the SHARED emit_wall_renderer, replacing the M9 two-band background; byte-exact vs the oracle render_wall_frame(floor_texturing=False) on the square room
algorithm: per column the wall tiles rows [top,bottom]; ceiling = rows y<cexcl (cexcl=min(top,VIEW_H)), floor = rows y>=fstart (fstart=max(bottom+1,0)); each plane pixel distance-lit via plane.draw_pixel (M13c2). The three bands tile every pixel (oracle _render_planes_flat).
emitter_change: emit_wall_renderer(map_wad, mapname, cfg, asset_wad=None): geometry-vs-assets split; drops render_background_reg; adds the plane pass-2 + yslope/zlight LUTs + the per-column plane param arrays
